{{Dialogue|Thyte|Reading a Type I atmosphere, Captain. Gravity, pressure and temperatures all in the green along the equatorial zones and adjacent latitudes.|Adrimetrum|Life signs, Lieutenant?|Thyte|Indeterminate, captain. I am reading evidence of technology, below the surface just north of the equatorial zone. No comm signatures or networks, minimal pollutants. It looks abandoned.|Gunthar|Surely, a man in your role recognizes the importance of peering past the shells of illusion, and searching for the truth that lies underneath.|Adrimetrum|Good point…|attr=[[Darryn Thyte]], [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]] and [[Gunthar]]|src=<ref name="TKR" />}}
'''Yvara''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Yvarema]] species. It was located just inside the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]]. The planet had a varied topography, with [[Water/Legends|ice]] and snow capped poles, vast [[Desert/Legends|desert]] plains, and [[Fungus/Legends|fungal]]-covered fields. Three [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] covered the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], and each of the continents were ringed by [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges to create a natural barrier. The planet's indigenous species, the [[Yvarema]], lived in underground warrens just north of the planet's equator.
